programme.title: Coffy
programme.desc: Pam Grier stars as Nurse "Coffy" Coffin, a one-woman vigilante force, out to even the score with those who have hooked her sister on drugs. Using her feminine wiles and deadly weapons, Coffy sets about ridding the streets of society's scum.

programme.title: Foxy Brown
programme.desc: Pam Grier portrays one of the screen's first action heroines with humor, sensitivity and steely determination. This electrifying revenge thriller explodes with all the sex appeal and cooler-than-cool attitude of its irresistible leading lady.

programme.title: The Thomas Crown Affair (1968)
programme.desc: Sophisticated, handsome Thomas Crown (Steve McQueen) is the intellect behind a bank robbery so stunning, it has Boston's finest completely baffled. Faye Dunaway is the sleek and smart insurance investigator out to bring him in.

programme.title: The Thomas Crown Affair (1999)
programme.desc: In this sizzling action film, when thrill-seeking billionaire Thomas Crown (Pierce Brosnan) ingeniously steals a priceless painting from a museum, he's pitted against the beautiful insurance investigator (Rene Russo) hired to retrieve the artwork.

programme.title: Cutter's Way
programme.desc: Suspected of murder, Richard Bone (Jeff Bridges) turns to his best friend, Alex Cutter (John Heard), for help finding the real killer. But when their suspect turns the tables on them, a cunning game of cat-and-mouse ignites into a full-blown war!

programme.title: Blown Away
programme.desc: When an explosion jolts Boston, bomb squad expert Jimmy Dove (Jeff Bridges) is thrust into the most harrowing work of his career. And when evidence points to his former mentor (Tommy Lee Jones), Dove must face a bitter enemy and a haunting past.

programme.title: Into the Blue
programme.desc: Paul Walker and Jessica Alba heat up the screen as two divers who dream of finding hidden treasure.

programme.title: Gang Related
programme.desc: Two killers are hiding where no one will ever find them...behind their badges! Tupac Shakur and James Belushi are two corrupt police detectives caught in a dangerous web of deceit in this gritty, smart and tough action thriller.

programme.title: At Close Range
programme.desc: A farm boy (Sean Penn) looking for excitement finds himself on a collision course with his smooth-talking gang leader father (Christopher Walken) in this "powerfully disturbing" (Newsweek) tale based on the story of real-life killer Bruce Johnston.

programme.title: Colors
programme.desc: As members of the Los Angeles Police Department's elite anti-gang unit, a seasoned cop (Robert Duvall) and his new partner (Sean Penn) are called in to assist with the crackdown against the mounting gang violence in the slums of East Los Angeles.

programme.title: Dark Blue
programme.desc: When the LAPD's elite Special Investigations Squad (SIS) is assigned a high-profile quadruple homicide, veteran detective Eldon Perry (Kurt Russell) takes the case. Known for his tough street tactics and a fiery temper, Eldon also tutors rookie Bobby Keough (Scott Speedman) in the grim realities of police intimidation and corruption. While navigating the tumultuous neighborhoods of South Central L.A., Perry and Keough must track down the cold-blooded killers as well as face their own demons - demons that prove more ruthless than the criminals they pursue.

programme.title: Enter The Ninja
programme.desc: When Cole (Franco Nero), a westerner trained in the deadly fighting rituals of Ninjitsu, is suddenly dragged into a dangerous dispute with an oil baron, he must face the best assassin money can buy, Ninja Hasegawa (martial arts legend Sho Kosugi)!
